scripts.pot: wp-env run cli wp i18n make-pot /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/image-usage-audit /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/image-usage-audit/languages/image-usage-audit.pot --domain=image-usage-audit --exclude=.agents,docs,tests,vendor,node_modules
scripts.plugin-check: wp-env run cli wp plugin install plugin-check --activate && wp-env run cli wp plugin check image-usage-audit
